title: Finish Containers tests and implementations
body:
Finish Containers tests and implementations
    
    * Add helper methods for streaming frames
    * Generalized creating tar files
    * Tweaked dict() scrubber to walk all container types
    * Container Prune
    * Container Run

    Depends on https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/9892
    
    Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body:
One question, one suggestion for possible consideration, and one unhappy test run.
Otherwise LGTM
LGTM but one of the tests, fedora-33, is unhappy.
@cevich Best advice on debugging this issue?

> @cevich Best advice on debugging this issue?

Ed noticed something very similar on other PRs, I suspect something is broken on the github or Cirrus-CI end.  Re-running the task is a good guess, but we need to wait for the problem to be fixed :D  Sometimes, making a small change and re-pushing is necessary.  But I just re-ran the task again (15-hours after you did), lets see if that makes a difference...
...okay better, we at least got logs this time.  Looks like some test failures?
